courseDetails.longDescription:
Curso: Bienestar Laboral: Diseña Programas de Bienestar que Funcionan


Un equipo saludable es un equipo de alto rendimiento.


Sin embargo, la mayoría de las empresas hablan sobre bienestar sin contar con una estrategia real para apoyarlo. Este curso es tu guía práctica para diseñar e implementar programas de bienestar laboral que realmente funcionan. Desde la reducción del agotamiento hasta la promoción de la salud mental, aprenderás a convertir el bienestar en una ventaja empresarial medible, y no solo en un beneficio adicional.


Aprenderás a evaluar las necesidades de tu organización, lanzar iniciativas de alto impacto y fomentar una cultura en la que las personas prosperen. Al finalizar, contarás con una estrategia integral de bienestar lista para implementar, junto con herramientas que te permitirán demostrar su ROI ante la dirección.


Este curso va más allá de la teoría: incluye casos prácticos, plantillas listas para usar y las mejores prácticas globales que podrás aplicar de inmediato, tanto si estás empezando desde cero como si buscas optimizar un programa ya existente.


Lo que aprenderás


• Evaluar las necesidades de bienestar mediante auditorías y diagnósticos culturales

• Diseñar una estrategia de bienestar alineada con los objetivos de negocio

• Diferenciar entre modelos tradicionales y actuales de bienestar laboral

• Abordar salud física y mental dentro del entorno de trabajo

• Crear y liderar equipos y embajadores de bienestar

• Aplicar técnicas de ciencia del comportamiento para crear hábitos saludables sostenibles

• El papel del HR en la cultura organizacional orientada al bienestar

• Medir el impacto del programa en la empresa con métricas claras

• Adoptar mejores prácticas de empresas líderes a nivel global


Por qué este curso funciona


• Creado por Mike Pritula, uno de los TOP 10 expertos en RRHH

• Basado en casos reales, no solo teoría

• Incluye tareas prácticas, herramientas descargables y feedback

• Acceso a una comunidad de HRs en el chat de preguntas y respuestas


¿Quieres crear un entorno laboral más saludable y obtener el respaldo de la dirección?


Este curso te brinda el plan paso a paso para lograrlo.


¡Inscríbete ahora y comienza a construir un programa de bienestar que genere resultados reales!

Este curso incluye el uso de inteligencia artificial. Garantiza conocimientos de vanguardia y las últimas prácticas.

Este curso incluye una promoción.

The “Searching on LinkedIn from A to Z” course at Mike Pritula Academy is designed to equip recruiters and sourcers with advanced techniques to effectively find passive candidates on LinkedIn. By mastering the platform’s tools, plugins, and search queries, participants can enhance their recruitment efficiency and outperform peers in talent acquisition.

3. Boolean Search on LinkedIn:

Master the use of search operators, understand their limitations, and learn methods to bypass these constraints.

4. X-ray Search on LinkedIn:

Explore advanced search queries to find candidates based on current or past companies, job titles, group memberships, languages, and more.

5. Additional Searches:

Utilize uploaded content searches, leverage paid accounts like Sales Navigator, and employ Google Custom Search Engines for enhanced results.

6. Useful Plugins for LinkedIn:

Integrate tools to uncover profile contacts, automate email campaigns, verify emails, scrape data, and generate Boolean strings.

courseDetails.title: Competency-Based Interview Course: STAR & Scorecards [EN]
courseDetails.shortDescription: Certified Interviewer | Behavioral Interview | Hiring Assessment | Interview Scorecard | STAR PARLA | Hiring Skills
courseDetails.longDescription:
This course contains the use of artificial intelligence.

Mastering Competency-Based Behavioral Interviews

Hiring the right talent is one of the most critical aspects of building a high-performing organization. Competency-based behavioral interviews help hiring managers, recruiters, and HR professionals assess candidates effectively by focusing on past experiences and demonstrated skills. This course is designed to equip you with the knowledge, techniques, and tools needed to conduct structured, competency-based interviews that lead to better hiring decisions.


Through practical case studies, real-world examples, and interview simulations, you’ll learn how to identify key competencies, structure behavioral interview questions, and evaluate candidate responses using a scoring system. Whether you are an HR professional, hiring manager, or recruiter, this course will enhance your interviewing skills and ensure you select the best-fit candidates for your organization.

What You’ll Learn:


The Fundamentals of Competency-Based Interviews – Understand the principles behind behavioral interviewing and how it improves hiring accuracy.


Developing a Competency Model – Learn how to define core competencies for different job roles and integrate them into the hiring process.


Crafting Effective Behavioral Interview Questions – Master the STAR (Situation, Task, Action, Result) method and other structured interview techniques.


Evaluating Candidates Objectively – Implement competency-based scoring rubrics and minimize bias in the selection process.


Avoiding Common Interviewing Mistakes – Identify biases, pitfalls, and ineffective questioning methods that can lead to poor hiring decisions.


Improving Hiring Decisions with Data – Leverage competency frameworks, assessment grids, and interview scorecards for better decision-making.

Course Program:


1. Introduction to Competency-Based Interviews

• The role of behavioral and competency-based interviews in modern recruitment

• Why past behavior predicts future performance

• Difference between structured and unstructured interviews


2. Developing a Competency Model for Hiring

• Understanding competency frameworks

• Identifying technical vs. soft skills competencies

• Customizing competency models for different roles


3. Crafting Effective Behavioral Interview Questions

• Writing open-ended, behavioral interview questions

• Using the STAR method to structure candidate responses

• Common mistakes in formulating competency-based questions


4. The Interview Process: Structuring & Conducting Effective Interviews

• Best practices for planning and structuring interviews

• Conducting panel interviews using a competency-based approach

• Ensuring fairness and consistency in the hiring process


5. Competency-Based Candidate Evaluation & Decision-Making

• Designing scoring matrices for competency assessments

• Using interview scorecards for structured decision-making

• Avoiding unconscious bias in candidate evaluations


6. Improving Hiring Success with Competency-Based Interviewing

• Case studies of companies using competency-based selection

• Implementing behavioral interview training in your company

• Measuring the impact of structured hiring on talent acquisition

Who Should Take This Course?


HR professionals & recruiters looking to refine their interview process and hire high-quality candidates.


Hiring managers seeking structured, data-driven methods to evaluate candidates more effectively.


Talent acquisition specialists aiming to implement competency-based hiring frameworks.


Business leaders & team leads involved in the selection of key employees.

Why Enroll in This Course?


Learn from Industry Experts – Gain insights from experienced HR leaders and recruiters.

Practical & Actionable Knowledge – Real-life examples, downloadable templates, and interview scripts.

Step-by-Step Training – From question design to evaluation scoring, master every aspect of behavioral interviews.

Certificate of Completion – Validate your expertise in competency-based hiring.

Improve your hiring accuracy and reduce turnover by mastering behavioral, competency-based interviewing!

Enroll now and start conducting structured, effective interviews today!
targetAudiences: This course is ideal for recruiters, hiring managers, and HR professionals looking to enhance their interviewing and candidate assessment skills, as well as those new to competency-based recruitment practices.

courseDetails.shortDescription: Operative Exzellenz | Geschäftsabläufe | Innovation | Prozessoptimierung | KPI | Strategie | Führung | Effizienz
courseDetails.longDescription:
Dieser Kurs beinhaltet den Einsatz künstlicher Intelligenz.

Kursbeschreibung

In der heutigen wettbewerbsintensiven Geschäftswelt spielt die Rolle des Chief Operating Officer (COO) eine entscheidende Rolle bei der Steigerung der operativen Effizienz und der Ausrichtung der täglichen Aktivitäten auf die strategischen Unternehmensziele. Dieser umfassende Kurs wurde sorgfältig entwickelt, um angehenden und aktuellen COOs, Operations Directors und Führungskräften die notwendigen Fähigkeiten und Instrumente zu vermitteln, um im operativen Leadership zu brillieren. Durch eine Kombination aus theoretischem Wissen und praxisnahen Anwendungen lernen die Teilnehmenden, Geschäftsprozesse zu verbessern, eine leistungsorientierte Kultur zu fördern und Strategien umzusetzen, die nachhaltiges Wachstum ermöglichen.


Was du lernen wirst

• Die COO-Rolle verstehen: Aufgaben, Verantwortlichkeiten und Schlüsselkompetenzen.

• Strategische Planung und Umsetzung: Entwicklung und Implementierung wirksamer Strategien mit Tools wie SWOT und PESTEL.

• Organisationskultur gestalten: Aufbau einer Kultur, die Strategie unterstützt und Engagement fördert.

• Performance Management: Einsatz von KPIs und OKRs zur Steuerung der Unternehmensleistung.

• Prozessoptimierung & Automatisierung: Analyse, Dokumentation und Optimierung von Geschäftsprozessen inkl. Automatisierung.

• Organisationsdesign: Aufbau von Strukturen, die Unternehmensziele unterstützen und Ressourcen optimal nutzen.

• Projektmanagement: Projekte von der Idee bis zur Umsetzung führen – im Einklang mit der Strategie.

• Finanzielle Kompetenz: Budgetierung, Forecasting, Cashflow-Steuerung und finanzielle Kontrolle.


Für wen ist dieser Kurs geeignet

• (Angehende) COOs, die ihre Führungs- und Operationskompetenzen erweitern möchten.

• Operations Directors und Manager, die operative Tätigkeiten strategisch ausrichten wollen.

• HR-Profis, die ihre Rolle um operative Verantwortung erweitern möchten.

• CEOs und Unternehmer, die Effizienz und Profitabilität steigern wollen.


Kursstruktur

Das Programm umfasst 10 ausführliche Lektionen, jede zu einem zentralen Aspekt der COO-Rolle. Die Lektionen werden wöchentlich veröffentlicht, damit du das Wissen schrittweise anwenden kannst. Jede Einheit beinhaltet Video-Lektionen, praktische Aufgaben und persönliches Feedback.


Wichtige Module

  1. Die Rolle des COO

    • Aufgaben und essentielle Kompetenzen

    • Tools zur Bewertung und Verbesserung operativer Effizienz

  2. Strategieentwicklung

    • Durchführung effektiver Strategie-Sessions

    • Anwendung strategischer Analysewerkzeuge

  3. Kulturmanagement

    • Unternehmenskultur definieren und verankern

    • Kultur als strategischen Vorteil nutzen

  4. Strategieumsetzung

    • KPIs und OKRs implementieren

    • Disziplinierte Ausführungsmodelle anwenden

  5. Prozessoptimierung

    • Prozesse dokumentieren, analysieren und verbessern

    • Automatisierung integrieren

  6. Struktur- und Organisationsmanagement

    • Strukturen passend zu Unternehmenszielen gestalten

    • Rollen klären und Headcount optimieren

courseDetails.title: Whistleblower Protection: Legal Frameworks & Ethics
courseDetails.shortDescription: A comprehensive guide to protected disclosures, corporate governance, ethical reporting, and legal risk management.
courseDetails.longDescription:
“This course contains the use of artificial intelligence.”

In the contemporary corporate landscape, the ability to identify, report, and manage internal misconduct is a critical component of operational resilience and regulatory compliance. Whistleblowing mechanisms serve as the primary defense against systemic fraud, safety violations, and reputational collapse. This course provides a rigorous, enterprise-grade examination of whistleblower protections, legal frameworks, and the managerial responsibilities necessary to maintain a compliant and ethical organization.


This curriculum is designed for professionals who require a deep understanding of the intersection between individual ethics, statutory law, and corporate governance. We move beyond basic definitions to explore the complex legal architectures established by the Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX), the Dodd-Frank Act, and OSHA regulations. Participants will gain the analytical skills to distinguish between personal grievances and legally protected disclosures, ensuring that organizational resources are focused on addressing genuine material risks.


The course is structured to guide learners through the entire lifecycle of a disclosure. It begins with the foundational principles of reportable misconduct, including financial fraud, harassment, and safety breaches. Following this, the curriculum details the specific statutory protections available to whistleblowers and the severe penalties associated with retaliation. A significant portion of the training is dedicated to the procedural mechanics of internal investigations, focusing on confidentiality, anonymity, and evidence preservation.


Furthermore, this course addresses the human element of compliance. It equips managers and leaders with strategies to foster "psychological safety," a cultural prerequisite that encourages early reporting and prevents issues from escalating into external scandals. By analyzing real-world case studies and investigation protocols, learners will understand how to operationalize transparency and accountability within their teams.


Key areas of focus include:

  • Legal & Regulatory Landscape: Comprehensive coverage of SOX, Dodd-Frank, and international directives affecting global organizations.

  • Operational Procedures: Best practices for utilizing hotlines, conducting intake, and managing the "discovery phase" of investigations.

  • Managerial Duty: Specific protocols for managers receiving reports, including immediate anti-retaliation steps and coordination with Legal/HR.

  • Risk Mitigation: Strategies to protect organizational reputation and financial stability through proactive internal controls.


This content is developed to meet the standards of corporate learning and development (L&D) departments, offering actionable insights for protecting both the whistleblower and the integrity of the institution.
targetAudiences: Compliance Officers, Risk Managers, and Internal Auditors seeking to update their regulatory knowledge.
